GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID.description: Google OAuth Client ID for Gemini CLI authentication. Get from https://console.cloud.google.com/apis/credentials

GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET.description: Google OAuth Client Secret for Gemini CLI authentication

GEMINI_REDIRECT_URI.description: OAuth redirect URI. Must match what's configured in Google Cloud Console. Format: https://your-domain.com/api/auth/gemini/callback

GEMINI_API_KEY.description: Google Gemini API key (fallback if OAuth not configured). Get from https://aistudio.google.com/apikey
